summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MathPlay Kids math teaching app. All backend APIs and frontend modules working perfectly. Tested all 6 modules (Count, Numbers, Add, Shapes, Quiz, Rewards), navigation, star tracking, progress system, and visual elements.
passed_tests: Home page loads with mascot and 6 module buttons
Counting module with object counting and visual feedback
Numbers module with big number display
Addition module with add/subtract toggle and visual math
Shapes module with SVG shape recognition
Quiz mode with progress bar and 10-question flow
Rewards page with stars, badges, and module progress
Auto-advance to next question after answering
